name: Sphere Game
short_description: First game of the "Sphere game" franchise also available for Xbox.
detailed_description:
This is the first game in the 'Sphere Game' franchise, also available for Xbox.
This 3D platformer delivers a unique, challenging, and visually stunning experience. Take control of a slightly weighted sphere and immerse yourself in a world full of challenges. Showcase your skills as you navigate through 15 engaging levels, designed with intriguing obstacles that will test your dexterity and agility.
Key features include realistic physics that provide an immersive gaming experience, ensuring that every movement of the sphere is authentic and dynamic. Explore three distinct difficulty levels - easy, hard, and impossible - to cater to all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players seeking an extreme challenge.
